hints.NUCLEUS: The control center of a cell, containing DNA
hints.MEMBRANE: Thin barrier that surrounds a cell
hints.SKELETAL: The body system made of bones
hints.MUSCULAR: The body system made of muscles
hints.NERVOUS: The body system that includes the brain and nerves
hints.DIGESTIVE: The body system that processes food
hints.LENS: Curved glass piece that focuses light
hints.STAGE: Flat surface where slides are placed
hints.PRISON: A place where criminals are confined
hints.BLOOD: Red fluid that circulates in your body
hints.FUEL: Substance burned for energy, like gasoline
